user.title: Connect to AE-200E / EW-50E
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Mitsubishi AE-200E or EW-50E controller (LAN1 port). Multiple controllers can be added as separate entries — just add the integration again for each additional controller.

data_description.host: The LAN1 IP address or hostname of the controller (e.g. 192.168.1.10)

reconfigure.title: Update AE-200E / EW-50E address
reconfigure.description: Update the IP address or hostname of this controller. Your existing entities and automations will be preserved.

data_description.host: The new LAN1 IP address or hostname of the controller (e.g. 192.168.1.20)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the controller. Check the IP address and ensure it is reachable on the LAN1 port.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host or IP address. Enter a valid hostname or IPv4 address (e.g. 192.168.1.10 or ae200.local).
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This controller is already configured. To change its address, use Reconfigure from the integration options.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The controller address has been updated. The integration will reload now.

init.title: AE-200E / EW-50E options
init.description: Adjust connection settings for this controller.

data_description.timeout: How many seconds to wait for a response from the controller before marking it unreachable. Increase this on slow or congested networks (default: 10 s).
